users.title: Users
users.description: Manage site accounts, administrator access, account status, and session revocation. This page focuses on account workflows instead of raw debug fields.
users.detailDescription: Manage account details, security actions, and the Minecraft profiles and textures that will belong to this account.
users.detailPageDescription: View and manage one account. Profiles, skins, and external authentication details will expand from here.
users.detailNotFoundDescription: This user does not exist, or you do not have permission to view it.
users.emptyDescription: After setup, accounts will appear here.
users.filteredEmptyDescription: Try a different keyword, role, or status.
users.createDescription: Create a local account and assign role/status immediately.
users.passwordMinLength: Password must contain at least 8 characters.
users.accountSectionDescription: Update this account's sign-in identity, administrator access, and status.
users.securitySectionDescription: Reset the sign-in password or revoke current sessions immediately.
users.minecraftSectionDescription: Profiles, skins, capes, and authentication details will live here. The page structure is ready so this does not grow back into a dialog.
users.noMinecraftProfiles: This user has no Minecraft profiles.
users.revokeSessionsDescription: The user will need to sign in again. This does not delete the account or Minecraft profiles.
